# Ultrasonicmeasurement

**Summary**: A non-destructive method used to map and measure the depth of fluid invasion in a core.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2001-mohammed|Mohammed, 2001]] implemented an ultrasonic technique to measure depth of invasion by drilling fluid filtrates and particles on Berea core samples.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- It provided a non-destructive way to determine the extent of mud invasion into the formation. ([[2001-mohammed|Mohammed, 2001, p. 17]])
